scope.phase_1_task: Scene setup, shared organic material helpers, cameras, lighting, root rig, whole-cell context socket, one early review render, and builder report only.

overall_status.phase_2_gate_reason: Phase 2 should not begin for the full batch until export-prep conventions are fixed. Mitochondrion, rough_er, and lysosome export reviewers explicitly did not approve continuation.

blockers: WholeCell_ContextSocket has an unapplied 90-degree rotation transform.
Roblox mapping for Nucleus_RootRig and WholeCell_ContextSocket is not yet defined.
Future phases need measured triangle, material, texture, and object counts.

nucleus.director_notes: Phase 1 scaffold is acceptable. Export-prep requirements must be fixed before any Roblox-bound export.

blockers: WholeCell_ContextSocket has non-default rotation and scale without an export-prep transform bake.
Organic_RoundedBevel and Organic_WeightedNormals modifiers are not applied or documented for export.
Triangle, material, texture, and object counts are not measured.

mitochondrion.director_notes: Do not start Phase 2 until export-prep and measurement reporting are added.

blockers: Socket review shell and orientation ring keep non-default transforms without an export-prep bake.
No Roblox-ready export artifact is produced or listed.
Triangle, material, texture, and object counts are not measured.
Roblox mapping for RoughER_RootRig and WholeCell_ContextSocket is undefined.

rough_er.director_notes: Do not start Phase 2 until export-prep and Roblox socket mapping are documented.

blockers: No FBX, OBJ, glTF, Roblox-ready asset, or export collection is produced or listed.
No explicit export-prep validation confirms transforms are applied or baked.
WholeCell_ContextSocket_ReviewGhost has non-default scale and must remain excluded from production export.

golgi.director_notes: Phase 1 scaffold may continue after minor structural fixes, but export collection and transform bake rules should be added first.

blockers: No Roblox export artifact or export manifest is produced.
No explicit transform-application or export-only collection workflow exists.
Exported files and manual setup notes are missing.
Triangle, material, texture, and object counts are not measured.

lysosome.director_notes: Do not start Phase 2 until export manifest, export-only collection, and budget reporting are added.

blockers.summary: Phase 1 scripts do not share a standard export-prep step for applying or baking transforms and excluding review-only geometry.
Reviewers could not verify Roblox import behavior because no export artifact list, export collection, or export manifest was produced.
Reports do not consistently measure triangle count, object count, material count, and texture count.
Root rigs and whole-cell context sockets need an explicit Roblox mapping: Model pivot, Attachment placement, metadata-only helpers, and excluded review geometry.

repeated_issues: Export readiness was judged more strictly than Phase 1 builder scope, creating a mismatch between requested scaffold-only builds and final export review criteria.
Review-only socket or guide geometry needs a consistent naming and exclusion convention.
Every organelle needs closer Phase 2 review renders in addition to the early scene scaffold render.
Several reviewers requested manifest validation inside scripts or reports so created and incomplete component names cannot drift.
Procedural materials and Blender modifiers need explicit bake/apply/defer rules before Roblox import.

AGENTS.md: Add a Phase 1 export-readiness minimum: even scaffold phases must list export candidates, excluded review-only objects, transform status, and budget metrics.
Define whether Phase 1 Roblox export review is a hard gate or a readiness advisory. Current reviewers interpreted it inconsistently.
Require each builder report to include object count, triangle count, material count, texture count, and transform status.
shared_helpers: Add a shared export-prep helper that applies or reports transforms on export candidates.
Add a shared manifest validation helper that checks created and incomplete component names against component_manifest.json.
Add a shared report helper for budget metrics and export artifact lists.
Add a shared convention for export collections: exportable meshes, metadata helpers, cameras/lights, and review-only guides.
review_protocol: Split Roblox export review into scaffold-readiness and final-export gates.
Require reviewers to distinguish blocking Phase 1 issues from Phase 2 prerequisites.

required_pre_phase_2_fix_batch: Add shared export-prep and manifest validation helpers.
Update each Phase 1 builder report with export candidates, excluded helpers, transform status, and measured budget metrics.
Define Roblox mapping for RootRig and WholeCell_ContextSocket.
Regenerate or revise export reviews after the above evidence exists.
